name: Spiced Basmati Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
2. Add rice, garam masala, garlic, ginger, and salt to the pan. Stir well to combine.
3. Pour in water and bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and cover the pot. Cook for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let stand, covered, for an additional 5-10 minutes.
6. Fluff with a fork. Garnish with ginger and parsley if desired.
